violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Several boxes of food were stored on the floor under the shelves in the walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Shelf and drawer in the white reach in freezer by the three compartment sink are broken.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the food storage shelves in the walk in cooler needs to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. A wet mop was stored in the bottom of the mop bucket in the back room.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
